name: Avocado Cake with Dates
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Thawed frozen nonfat egg substitute (equal to 2 eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a nonstick 9-inch-square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray or lightly brush with butter.
2. In a large bowl, sift together cake flour, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a small bowl, blend together mashed avocados, egg substitute, and nonfat milk.
4. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients along with chopped dates until blended.
5. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wood pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan. Sprinkle lightly with powdered sugar if desired.
8. Garnish top with a few slivers of dates, if desired.
Per serving: 217 calories, 4 grams fat, no cholesterol, 119 milligrams sodium.
